schema.title: Response Get Active Plan V1 Meal Plans Active Get

get.description:
Return active-plan targets if one exists, otherwise Mifflin-St Jeor
defaults derived from profile + latest body weight.

Fitbit subscriber verification: returns 204 if `verify` matches the
configured code, otherwise 404 (per Fitbit docs).

post.description:
Receive a Fitbit notification, verify signature, enqueue sync_user
for each affected ownerId. Body is a JSON array of subscription events.

ScheduledWorkoutWithDay.title: ScheduledWorkoutWithDay
ScheduledWorkoutWithDay.description: Calendar view: includes the program day name and exercise count.

SetCreate.title: SetCreate
SetCreate.description:
Fields are all optional at the Pydantic layer because validity depends
on the parent exercise's `tracking_type`, which the route resolves before
calling `validate_set_payload`.
